news.title:
Adani Group shifts focus to margins, easing rivalry with UltraTech Cement.
Ambuja Cements may delay FY28 155 mtpa target to enhance utilization and profitability.
news.summary:
Adani Group shifts focus to margins, easing rivalry with UltraTech Cement.
Ambuja Cements may delay FY28 155 mtpa target to enhance utilization and profitability.

news.title:
NCLT approves Sanghi Industries' amalgamation into Ambuja Cements, effective March 12, 2026.
Sanghi shareholders to receive Ambuja equity shares by April 6, 2026.
news.summary:
NCLT approves Sanghi Industries' amalgamation into Ambuja Cements, effective March 12, 2026.
Sanghi shareholders to receive Ambuja equity shares by April 6, 2026.

news.title:
Ambuja shifts focus from volume growth to value accretion, aiming profitability via margin accretive growth and premium products.
Cost control efforts target clinker cost cuts, aiming savings by FY27. Stock down 19% in 2026, faces weak cement prices, rising input costs.
news.summary:
Ambuja shifts focus from volume growth to value accretion, aiming profitability via margin accretive growth and premium products.
Cost control efforts target clinker cost cuts, aiming savings by FY27. Stock down 19% in 2026, faces weak cement prices, rising input costs.

news.title:
Ambuja Cement focuses on enhancing trade sales and premium cement mix.
Management aims to prioritize value, as per Nuvama's plant visit report.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cement focuses on enhancing trade sales and premium cement mix.
Management aims to prioritize value, as per Nuvama's plant visit report.

news.title:
Citi rates Ambuja Cements Neutral with a target price of ₹635.
Sanghipuram plant upgrades cut clinker costs to <₹2,000/t; ₹2bn capex spent, ₹6bn ongoing.
news.summary:
Citi rates Ambuja Cements Neutral with a target price of ₹635.
Sanghipuram plant upgrades cut clinker costs to <₹2,000/t; ₹2bn capex spent, ₹6bn ongoing.

news.title:
Jefferies retains 'Buy' on Ambuja Cements, target Rs 735, citing focus on utilization & profitability.
Rising petcoke costs may hit margins unless April cement price hikes offset fuel expenses.
news.summary:
Jefferies retains 'Buy' on Ambuja Cements, target Rs 735, citing focus on utilization & profitability.
Rising petcoke costs may hit margins unless April cement price hikes offset fuel expenses.

news.title:
HSBC maintains Buy on Ambuja Cements with a target price of Rs 670.
Cites strong limestone reserves, Sanghi growth, ROI focus, ~12.4x FY27E EV/EBITDA valuation.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains Buy on Ambuja Cements with a target price of Rs 670.
Cites strong limestone reserves, Sanghi growth, ROI focus, ~12.4x FY27E EV/EBITDA valuation.

news.title:
Top cement firms saw profit growth in Q3 FY26 despite price pressures.
Volume gains and operating leverage offset GST rate impact and lack of price hikes.
news.summary:
Top cement firms saw profit growth in Q3 FY26 despite price pressures.
Volume gains and operating leverage offset GST rate impact and lack of price hikes.

news.title: Ambuja Cements gets NCLT approval for arrangement with Sanghi Industries.
news.summary: Ambuja Cements gets NCLT approval for arrangement with Sanghi Industries.

news.title:
NCLT approves Ambuja-Sanghi merger, aiding expansion and efficiency.
Sanghi shareholders to get 12 Ambuja shares for every 100 held; Ambuja targets 140 MTPA by FY28.
news.summary:
NCLT approves Ambuja-Sanghi merger, aiding expansion and efficiency.
Sanghi shareholders to get 12 Ambuja shares for every 100 held; Ambuja targets 140 MTPA by FY28.

news.title:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.
news.summary:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.

news.title:
Ambuja Cements presented at US and UAE conferences, highlighting India's GDP growth and cement demand.
Presentation focused on Adani's cement portfolio growth, acquisitions, and infrastructure-driven consumption.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements presented at US and UAE conferences, highlighting India's GDP growth and cement demand.
Presentation focused on Adani's cement portfolio growth, acquisitions, and infrastructure-driven consumption.

news.title:
Adani Enterprises led Adani Group's rally with a near 10% gain, trading close to the upper circuit.
Adani Green, Energy gained over 7%, while Ports, Power, Ambuja surged 4%+ on US-India trade deal boost.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises led Adani Group's rally with a near 10% gain, trading close to the upper circuit.
Adani Green, Energy gained over 7%, while Ports, Power, Ambuja surged 4%+ on US-India trade deal boost.

news.title: Ambuja Cements announces Ajay Kapur's superannuation as managing director.
news.summary: Ambuja Cements announces Ajay Kapur's superannuation as managing director.

news.title:
Ajay Kapur retires as MD of Ambuja Cements effective Jan 31, 2026.
New KMPs from Feb 1, 2026: Vinod Bahety (CEO), Rohit Soni (CFO), Manish Mistry (CS).
news.summary:
Ajay Kapur retires as MD of Ambuja Cements effective Jan 31, 2026.
New KMPs from Feb 1, 2026: Vinod Bahety (CEO), Rohit Soni (CFO), Manish Mistry (CS).

news.title:
Ambuja Cements posted its highest quarterly revenue of Rs 10,277 Cr in Q3 FY25-26, with sales volume at 18.9 MT.
The company remains debt-free, achieved 13.2% EBITDA margin, and operationalised a 2.4 MTPA Marwar Unit.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements posted its highest quarterly revenue of Rs 10,277 Cr in Q3 FY25-26, with sales volume at 18.9 MT.
The company remains debt-free, achieved 13.2% EBITDA margin, and operationalised a 2.4 MTPA Marwar Unit.

news.title: Ambuja Cements reports Q3 net profit of ₹204 crore, missing expectations of ₹619 crore.
news.summary: Ambuja Cements reports Q3 net profit of ₹204 crore, missing expectations of ₹619 crore.

news.title:
Ambuja Cements Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹5.1B from ₹6B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 8.7% from 11.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements Q3 EBITDA fell to ₹5.1B from ₹6B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 8.7% from 11.8% YoY.

news.title:
Ambuja Cements' Q3 profit falls, while Nestle India and AIA Engineering see profit growth.
Brigade Enterprises' profit declines; updates include NTPC, Bajaj Auto, and Cholamandalam Investment.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements' Q3 profit falls, while Nestle India and AIA Engineering see profit growth.
Brigade Enterprises' profit declines; updates include NTPC, Bajaj Auto, and Cholamandalam Investment.

news.title:
Adani Enterprises fell 10.8% to ₹1,861.8 after U.S. SEC sought direct summons over bribery cases.
The stock opened at ₹2,080, peaked at ₹2,082, but dropped to ₹1,848 before slight recovery.
news.summary:
Adani Enterprises fell 10.8% to ₹1,861.8 after U.S. SEC sought direct summons over bribery cases.
The stock opened at ₹2,080, peaked at ₹2,082, but dropped to ₹1,848 before slight recovery.
